label: CompTIA A+ Practical Labs & Troubleshooting (Exams 220-1201 & 220-1202)
description: CompTIA A+ Practical Labs & Troubleshooting (Exams 220-1201 & 220-1202) is a strictly hands-on study notes course built for A+ V15 exam prep, focused on real-world lab workflows rather than theory. Each module walks through technician workstation setup, ticket documentation, hardware assembly, OS deployment, network configuration, MDM enrollment, and troubleshooting on Windows 11, macOS Sequoia, Ubuntu 24.04, and ChromeOS Flex using exact commands, diagnostic tools, and expected outputs.
